allow: Bash(sudo -u openclaw bash -c 'export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$\(id -u\); export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=unix:path=/run/user/$\(id -u\)/bus; systemctl --user status openclaw-gateway 2>&1')
Bash(sudo -u openclaw bash -lc 'export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$\(id -u\); export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=unix:path=/run/user/$\(id -u\)/bus; systemctl --user status openclaw-gateway')
Bash(sudo -u openclaw bash -c 'export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$\(id -u\); journalctl --user -u openclaw-gateway --no-pager -n 100 2>&1; echo ""EXIT:$?""')

Bash(sudo -u openclaw bash -c 'export XDG_RUNTIME_DIR=/run/user/$\(id -u\); export DBUS_SESSION_BUS_ADDRESS=""unix:path=/run/user/$\(id -u\)/bus""; systemctl --user restart openclaw-gateway 2>&1; sleep 3; systemctl --user status openclaw-gateway 2>&1')
